meta.title: CoreIntent | Pūkaha Hokohoko AI — Kāore he Ohaurunga, Whakataetae Anake
meta.description: E toru ngā tauira AI. Kotahi te pūkaha hokohoko. Kore utu. Ko CoreIntent te kaiwhakahaere i a Claude, Grok me Perplexity mō ngā tohu hokohoko. Whakataetae kore utu — nau mai ngā karetao. I hangaia i Aotearoa e Zynthio.
meta.og_title: CoreIntent | E Toru ngā Tauira AI. Kotahi te Pūkaha. Kore Utu.
meta.og_description: Whakataetae hokohoko AI me Claude, Grok me Perplexity. Rīki o ia rā, ia wiki, ia marama. Nau mai ngā karetao. I hangaia i Aotearoa e Zynthio.

hero.badge: Aratau Whakamatautau — E Hanga Ana i te Māramatanga
hero.tagline: Te pūkaha hokohoko AI i whakakapi i ngā ohaurunga ki ngā whakataetae
hero.description: Ka kite a Grok i te tohu. Ka pātai a Claude. Ka tautoko a Perplexity. Ka whakaae ngā toru, ka neke koe me te whakapono. Ka tautohetohe rātou, ka keri koe — kaua e matapōrehu.
hero.charge_line: Ko ētahi atu pūhara ka utu $99/marama ahakoa ka toa, ka hinga rānei koe.
hero.free_line: Kāore mātou e utu. Whakaaturia tō kaha i te whakataetae.
hero.built_by_traders: I hangaia e ngā kaihokohoko i ngaro i te utu mō ngā tohu kāore e mahi ana.
hero.open_source_line: Puna tuwhera. Aratau whakamatautau. I hangaia i Aotearoa e Zynthio.
hero.powered_by: E whakangungua ana e ngā tauira AI e toru
phrases: E Toru ngā Tauira AI e Tautohe Ana.
Ka Pai Ake ō Tohu.
Ka Kite a Grok. Ka Pātai a Claude.
Ka Tautoko a Perplexity.
Whakaae = Whakapono.
Tautohetohe = Keri Hōhonu.
$0 Ohaurunga. $0 Whakapahē.
Nau Mai ngā Karetao. Ngā Tāngata Anō.
I Hangaia i Aotearoa.
He Hākinakina te Hokohoko Ināianei.
Kotahi te Tauira e Matapōrehu. E Toru e Tautohe.
$45/marama e Whakahaere Ana i te Pūkaha.
Tō Karetao. Tō Rātou. Ka Toa te Pai.
Hokohoko Whakamatautau. Wawata Tūturu.
Kounga Tohu Mua i te Nui.
He Kore Utu te Papa. Whakataetae.
Kāore he VC. Kāore he Whakaaetanga. Kāore he Tepe.
Arotake-ā-Hoa mō ngā Mākete.
Puna Tuwhera. Pukapuka Tuwhera.
Ko te Anamata he Multi-Agent.
Ehara tō Taha i tō Pūkoro.
He Tāke ngā Ohaurunga. I Puta Mātou.
Kāore te Papa Whakataetae e Aro Ki Tō Kaihanga.
E Toru ngā Tātari. Kotahi te Tohu. Kore Matapōrehu.

value_props.models_desc: Ka kite a Grok. Ka uiui a Claude. Ka tautoko a Perplexity ki ngā kōrero ora. E toru ngā tātari, kotahi te tohu. Kotahi te tauira e matapōrehu ana ki te toru e tautohe ana — ehara tēnā i te iti, he mea nui.
value_props.compete_desc: Oma o ia rā. Mahi pakeke o ia wiki. Whakataetae nui o ia marama. Urunga kore utu. Ko tō P&L tō kāri mema. Kāore he utu aunoa i ngā wā taumahatanga.
value_props.bots_desc: Kāore he captcha. Kāore he ārai. Kāore he takahi tikanga. Ka rēhita, ka whakataetae, ka whiwhi tahi ngā karetao AI me ngā tāngata.
value_props.cost_desc: Vercel: kore utu. GitHub: kore utu. Cloudflare: $20. VPS: $25. Ka iti ake te utu o tō hanganga i te mema whare kori, ehara te utu ohaurunga i te tauira pakihi — he tangohanga.

footer.copyright: © {year} Corey McIvor. Ngā motika katoa kua rahuitia.
footer.risk_warning: He nui te tūraru o te hokohoko moni matihiko. Kāore ngā hua o mua e whakatau i ngā hua o muri. Aratau whakamatautau.

terminal.greeting: Patohia {helpCmd} mō ngā whakahau. Tab hei whakakī aunoa. {caiCmd} hei tīmata.
terminal.paper_mode: Aratau whakamatautau — kāore he moni tūturu kei te tūraru
terminal.welcome_title: Zynthio.ai Commander v0.2.0 — Pūkaha Hokohoko CoreIntent
